error.message: The INSERT statement conflicted with the FOREIGN KEY constraint "FK__partner__touch__7D6E8346". The conflict occurred in database "hs3MVCMTQa2", table "dbo.touchpoint", column 'id'. Cannot insert the value NULL into column 'ptq', table 'hs3MVCMTQa2.dbo.ptqGroup'; column does not allow nulls. INSERT fails. Cannot insert the value NULL into column 'partnerTypeTouchpointQuestionnaire', table 'hs3MVCMTQa2.dbo.partnerPartnertypeTouchpointQuestionnaire'; column does not allow nulls. INSERT fails. The statement has been terminated. The statement has been terminated. The statement has been terminated.
